name: create_payment
description: Create a new payment in Mollie. You specify an amount, currency, and description, and Mollie returns a checkout URL where the customer can complete the payment. You must redirect the customer to that URL. Supports credit cards, iDEAL, PayPal, Bancontact, and many other European payment methods.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount to charge. An object with 'currency' (ISO 4217, e.g. 'EUR') and 'value' (string with two decimals, e.g. '10.00').

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A short description of the payment shown on the customer's bank or card statement. Max 255 characters.

parameters.name: redirectUrl
parameters.description: The URL the customer is redirected to after completing or cancelling the payment. Required for most payment methods.

parameters.name: webhookUrl
parameters.description: URL Mollie will POST to when the payment status changes. Use this for server-side confirmation.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Force a specific payment method (e.g. 'ideal', 'creditcard', 'paypal'). If omitted, the customer chooses on the checkout page.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Custom metadata to attach to the payment. Useful for storing your own order IDs or references. Max ~1kB.
